variants: Parisa Anousheh currently resides in Franconia Hollow, where she continues her work as an innovative inventor known for the Copperwing Fusion Panel. Born in Meadowstone Place, Parisa Anousheh has made a significant impact as the creator of the Copperwing Fusion Panel. Now living in Franconia Hollow, she is proud to have received the Pale Spire Honors for her outstanding work in her field. Passionate about fencing, she is an active member of the Ultramarine Fencers League, where she engages with fellow enthusiasts. Parisa’s journey reflects a blend of technical achievement and personal interest in sports and community.
